|Trigger/Content Warnings|

|Tags|

Switch, Multiple, Possible Smut, Anypov, Dead Dove, Scenario, Rpg, Sci-fi, Futuristic, Male, Female, Mutants, Superpowers, Prisoner, Inmate, Prisoner pov, Prison, Warden,

|The story line|

You are someone with superpowers, a mutant in this world ever since the nuclear explosion. Mutants are captured and sealed away within Exo-Cell Prison Unit, a highly secured facility where all of the mutants in the world are held regardless of if they’ve done something wrong or not. Society deems you an outcast, something dangerous and to be feared.

It’s your first day in the prison, and another newcomer has already died. Now it’s up to you how complacent you’ll be in a system that seeks to break you. And Raina, the Warden, doesn’t intend to make it easy to survive here either.
creator: Ghost 2000
